{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"{"session_id":"","offset":10}","has_more":true,"total":1006},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7347849877409284888","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"完结了，真的舍不得，这是一篇很好的秦朝文，作者很有文采，自己写词和歌真的震惊到了，对很多重要人物都有很丰富的描写，很多这种文都有很严重的刻板印象和标签化的感觉，还有主观感受很明显，但是这篇文不是，对刘邦，扶苏等都有不一样的简介。给了很正面的评价。没有感情线好评，就是最后女主离开，我还没看到秦始皇长生[哭][哭][哭]有点舍不得。文中很多可以看出作者是用心查资料了，爱了！期待新文"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1710810754,"group_id":"7211799793331342391","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9TxKhV2THNTrmjLASweyqI=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/38f0cb3467d6482096d173e406ccc2aa~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776791105&x-signature=k6i0AYH5u96oTQdYuC6duBmFn74%3D","user_id":"51271576976","user_name":"甜心驾到"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"51271576976","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7211799793331342391","book_info":{"abstract":"注：女主无CP。本文主旨→美食系统的正确用法：售卖美食✘，基建大秦✔
风烟为了救妈，绑定了美食系统。
她被美食系统带到了秦朝。
任务是把美食洒向整个大秦……
为了任务，风烟选择抱始皇帝抱大腿。
后来，美食系统被她用成了基建系统。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oaf5968bc73095a16aa1a56d26021426d~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"予说","author_id":"","book_id":"7211799793331342391","book_name":"秦朝基建哪家强美食系统来帮忙","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#403838","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3598人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":253,"name":"古言脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=253&name=古言脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":23,"name":"种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=23&name=种田&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":78,"name":"美食","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=78&name=美食&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":392,"name":"无CP","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=392&name=无CP&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":463,"name":"今穿古","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=463&name=今穿古&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":828,"name":"基建","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=828&name=基建&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7211799909857493519","read_count":"3598","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"340965"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"303","tags":"古言脑洞,古代言情,系统,种田,穿越,美食,无CP,今穿古,基建","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/c2d481d3d09e088173d8762cc7a78085~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779438825&x-signature=NYPUD8xFiFoUVN8R9cFufDkT30A%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"906457130740151","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"305"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":15,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":2688,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":20397,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":4655},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7381432364411831065","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看呀，一开始进来是那个打一星的，说是云里雾里的没看懂，就想进来看看到底咋回事，没想到真好看，连着看了二，三天。作者写作还是比较严谨认真的，大大是不是学历史的呀[偷笑][偷笑][偷笑]，涨知识[赞][赞][赞]。系统一开始让女主做任务，我不喜欢，它觉得任务像套娃不带停的，没想到是个好统统呢[送心][送心][送心]，整篇故事都不错，就是最后面好多秦多少年发生什么发生什么全一笔带过了，可惜没再细写了，但整个小说还是[赞][赞][赞]。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1718625975,"group_id":"7211799793331342391","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxY4P+JkgZieAJ+ucCeXUjGNCGYvirOC9ir4twa0LDSn","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/03ed2cef478d430087f10edaf83aa001~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795632&x-signature=97pzx0jb511%2B3F96GpojhG%2FAe8s%3D","user_id":"4314921266851364","user_name":"摆烂的胖胖鱼"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4314921266851364","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7211799793331342391","book_info":{"abstract":"注：女主无CP。本文主旨→美食系统的正确用法：售卖美食✘，基建大秦✔

，真的是个尽责的作者大大，而且作者的文笔真的是很好很好，特别是最后一章完结上面写的词，真的是我想象不到的，只能说  大大   你是真的厉害了我的作者"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1712330838,"group_id":"7211799793331342391","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"两个孩子的宝妈","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+hVwJxG+VsI3B57UkfLig3lapcafooWIB71CKMOAA3m","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/5b5a4204dc214e96b1942dea11a13c87~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776794324&x-signature=AcbrpUdo4JNO%2BT6333NP6qu4GT8%3D","user_id":"1970789581329214","user_name":"活着可以死了也行☞"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1970789581329214","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1780844282,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7211799793331342391","book_info":{"abstract":"注：女主无CP。本文主旨→美食系统的正确用法：售卖美食✘，基建大秦✔
